title: I DON'T PLAY
status: media upload pending manual binary upload
notes: Use MP3 for GitHub Pages preview; keep WAV masters outside GitHub or in a release/storage bucket.
WAV masters in the sandbox are 28-32 MB each and are better treated as masters, not web preview assets.
Once binaries are uploaded to the recommended paths, the page media/i-dont-play/index.html can reference them directly.
